# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    name: MyFunctionApp
    location: East US
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', 'MyAppServicePlan')]"
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
            value: dotnet
          - name: ManagedIdentity.1.principalId
            value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'MyFunctionApp'), '2016-03-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
          - name: ManagedIdentity.1.tenantId
            value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'MyFunctionApp'), '2016-03-01', 'Full').identity.tenantId]"
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    name: MyStorageAccount
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: 2019-09-01
    name: MyKeyVault
    properties:
      sku:
        family: 'A'
        name: 'standard'
      tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"
      accessPolicies:
        - objectId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'MyFunctionApp'), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
          tenantId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'MyFunctionApp'), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.tenantId]"
          permissions:
            keys:
              - get
              - list
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    name: MySqlServer
    properties:
      administratorLogin: myadmin
      administratorLoginPassword: 'P@ssword123'
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
    apiVersion: 2019-12-12
    name: MyCosmosDb
    properties:
      databaseAccountOfferType: Standard
      locations:
        - failoverPriority: 0
          locationName: East US
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2018-09-01
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'MyFunctionApp'), 'MyAppRoleAssignment')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'MyFunctionApp'), '2016-03-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Reader')]"
      scope: "[resourceGroup().id]"
